notes: Cross-reference of all routes using any segment of Shaw Boulevard, from Kalentong (Mandaluyong/Manila boundary) to C-5 (Pasig). Covers EDSA Central Jeepney Terminal, MRT-3 Shaw Blvd Station feeders, intra-Pasig Shaw jeepneys, P2P buses, UV Express, and western Shaw (Mandaluyong → Manila) routes. Sources: Sakay live explorer, LTFRB jeepney DB, directionsonweb.blogspot.com, Wikipedia, Moovit, Rome2rio, OSM, p2p-routes.json, transit-blogs.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Central – Tipas (Taguig) via San Joaquin → Pateros (PUJ_916 / T279)
routes.origin: EDSA Central Jeepney Terminal, Mandaluyong City
routes.frequency_notes: 04:00 AM – 10:00 PM daily; ~5–10 min peak headway (standard PUJ)
routes.notes: DOTR franchise code: R_SAKAY_PUJ_916 on Sakay live explorer (HIGH). LTFRB alternate code: T279. Same physical route: T279 uses 'Pateros' as destination, PUJ_916 uses 'Tipas' as intermediate then Pateros. Routes south from Shaw through Kapitolyo, crosses C5 at Bagong Ilog, passes Pasig Rotonda and Pasig Cathedral, follows San Joaquin to Pateros. Key MRT-3 Shaw station feeder for Pateros/Taguig bound commuters.

routes.origin: EDSA Central Jeepney Terminal, Mandaluyong City
routes.frequency_notes: 04:00 AM – 10:00 PM daily; long-haul route, ~15–30 min headway
routes.notes: DOTR franchise code: R_SAKAY_PUJ_923 on Sakay live explorer (HIGH). Also in LTFRB franchise DB. Long-haul jeepney from EDSA Central to Morong, Rizal Province via Ortigas Ave Extension. One of the longest PUJ routes from the Shaw corridor.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Blvd – E. Rodriguez Ave / Brgy. Ugong, Vargas Ave (T276)
routes.destination: E. Rodriguez Ave / Vargas Ave, Brgy. Ugong, Pasig
key_stops: E. Rodriguez Ave / Vargas Ave, Ugong
routes.frequency_notes: Standard PUJ frequency; specific headway unknown
routes.notes: LTFRB franchise code T276. Medium confidence — single primary source (LTFRB DB). E. Rodriguez Ave / Vargas Ave in Ugong (Pasig) is south of Shaw Blvd and accessible via Pasig's cross-streets. Serves Ugong industrial/commercial area.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Blvd – E. Rodriguez / Ortigas Ave (T277)
routes.destination: E. Rodriguez / Ortigas Ave intersection, Pasig
key_stops: E. Rodriguez Sr. Ave / Ortigas Ave intersection
routes.frequency_notes: Standard PUJ frequency; specific headway unknown
routes.notes: LTFRB code T277. Also referenced in validated-ortigas-avenue-corridor (youtube-routes source). Short connector from EDSA/Shaw to the Ortigas Ave area. T278 is a near-duplicate (abbreviated 'E.R. Ort' destination) — likely same route. Collapse T278 into T277 for GTFS.

routes.frequency_notes: Standard long-haul PUJ frequency; ~15–30 min peak
routes.notes: OSM code T290; 16.3 km route. Uses Ortigas Ave as primary Pasig–Antipolo corridor, terminates at EDSA/Shaw rather than continuing into Manila. Documented in OSM wiki and Moovit (reverse direction confirmed). Also in validated-ortigas-corridor as cross-listed route.

routes.route_name: Shaw Blvd (Mandaluyong) – Quezon Ext., Binangonan, Rizal
routes.notes: Moovit documented: 103 stops, ~144 min total journey. Departs from Shaw Blvd westbound section in Mandaluyong, passes through EDSA Central Terminal, then routes via Ortigas Ave Extension into Rizal Province to Binangonan. Consistent with Binangonan destination listed at Greenfield District terminal field survey.

routes.frequency_notes: 6:00 AM – 12:00 midnight daily; long-haul frequency ~20–30 min
routes.notes: Moovit documented: 122 stops, ~118 min trip. Originates at EDSA/Shaw intersection. Hours confirmed 6AM–midnight. Teresa is ~35 km from EDSA/Shaw; extremely long PUJ route. Listed at EDSA Central terminal as 'Teresa' destination.

routes.route_name: Shaw Blvd – San Miguel Ave, Pasig (intra-corridor)
routes.notes: LTFRB-operated per Rome2rio and Moovit data. Short cross-corridor route linking Shaw Blvd to San Miguel Ave in Pasig (near Ortigas Center). Reverse direction also confirmed: San Miguel Ave / Doña Julia Vargas → Shaw Blvd, Mandaluyong (~4 min, every 15 min).

routes.route_name: Shaw Blvd – Meralco Ave Flyover / Doña Julia Vargas, Pasig (intra-corridor)
routes.destination: Meralco Ave Flyover / Doña Julia Vargas Ave Intersection, Pasig
key_stops: Meralco Ave / Doña Julia Vargas, Pasig
routes.frequency_notes: Every ~5 min; ~5 min journey (highest frequency Shaw–Pasig route)
routes.notes: LTFRB-operated per Moovit and Rome2rio. Fastest and most frequent short-haul route connecting Shaw corridor to Meralco Ave/Ortigas gateway. Doña Julia Vargas Ave connects to Ortigas Center. Reverse also confirmed (~5 min).

routes.route_name: Shaw Blvd / A. Luna St – Caruncho Ave / Market Ave, Pasig
routes.origin: A. Luna St / Shaw Blvd, Pasig
routes.destination: Caruncho Ave / Market Ave Intersection, Pasig City
routes.frequency_notes: 6:00 AM – 11:00 PM daily; regular jeepney frequency
routes.notes: Moovit documented with stop-level data. Arlegui, Manila is listed as one terminal variant in Rome2rio, suggesting this route may continue further into Manila. Caruncho Ave/Market Ave area is the Pasig public market zone — major local destination.
Rome2rio documented. Very short route (~4 min, q5 min) — essentially the Mandaluyong → Pioneer / Kapitolyo local connector. Pioneer area is the gateway to Kapitolyo Pasig commercial area.

routes.route_name: Boni (Robinsons Complex) – Kalentong / JRC, Manila (western Shaw)
routes.notes: Wikipedia (Shaw Blvd article). Uses western section of Shaw Blvd from Mandaluyong toward Kalentong at Manila border. JRC = Jose Rizal College area. No LTFRB franchise code identified.

routes.route_name: Pasig (TP) – Quiapo (Echague) via Sta. Mesa, C. Palanca (Shaw west to Manila)
routes.notes: Wikipedia (Shaw Blvd article). Through-route from Pasig City market area to Quiapo via the full length of Shaw Blvd (Pasig → Mandaluyong) then through Sta. Mesa/Quiapo. Represents Shaw Blvd's function as a through-corridor. No LTFRB code identified.

routes.route_name: City Bus Route 12 — Pasig–Kalentong via Shaw Blvd
routes.notes: Transit-blogs-enthusiast-sites source; listed in MC 2020-019 Metro Manila Bus Rationalization Program route table under 'Shaw corridor'. CONFLICT: Pre-rationalization Route 12 = Pasig–Taytay via Ortigas Ave (Ortigas corridor); rationalization may have reassigned this number to a different Shaw Blvd route. No operator, OSM relation, or field confirmation found. Treat as unconfirmed until verified. May not be currently operating.

routes.route_name: Starmall EDSA Shaw – Alabang Town Center (RRCG P2P)
routes.frequency_notes: 30+ daily trips weekdays 6:30AM–10PM; 9 trips Saturday; limited Sunday
routes.notes: Operator: RRCG Transport. Discounted fare: ₱112 (SC/PWD/student). Departs from Starmall EDSA-Shaw. Via EDSA/C-5 corridor southbound. Also serves as intermediate hub for RRCG Robinsons Cainta–Greenbelt 5 (₱90) and SM Masinag–One Ayala (₱140) routes. Confirmed in p2p-routes.json (HIGH) and validated-edsa-corridor.

routes.route_name: Vista Mall Taguig – Starmall EDSA Shaw (MetroExpress P2P)
routes.notes: Operator: MetroExpress Connect Inc. Via C-5. Single source (p2p-routes.json). Fare not documented. Connects Vista Mall Taguig to Starmall EDSA-Shaw via C-5, suggesting a Taguig → Mandaluyong express corridor.

routes.route_name: Taytay – EDSA Central (UV Express via Shaw/Ortigas corridor)
routes.frequency_notes: Regular UV Express service; specific headway unknown
routes.notes: LTFRB UV Express DB. 'EDSA Central' as destination refers to the EDSA/Shaw intersection terminal area. Routes Taytay via Ortigas Ave Extension to EDSA Central. Also cross-listed in Ortigas corridor.

routes.frequency_notes: Regular UV Express frequency from Antipolo terminal
routes.notes: Documented at EDSA Central terminal by directionsonweb field survey and Wikipedia. Multiple Antipolo UV Express routes terminate at EDSA Central; individual LTFRB route IDs not available from public sources.
